output.subject: Exclusive Upgrade Offer Just for You, Tom!
output.body:
Hi Tom,

As a valued subscriber for over 7 years, we appreciate your loyalty and want to offer you an exciting upgrade opportunity! 

With your current plan and your iPhone 14, you can enhance your experience with the Apple Watch S9 for just £22 a month. This smartwatch is designed to keep you connected and informed, featuring advanced health and fitness tracking, ECG and blood oxygen monitoring, and even Crash Detection and Emergency SOS. It's the perfect companion to help you stay on top of your health and safety.

Don’t miss out on this chance to elevate your tech game! 

Ready to upgrade? Click here to learn more and secure your Apple Watch S9 today!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade Your Plan for More Value, Priya!
output.body:
Hi Priya,

We hope you're enjoying your Motorola Moto G! As a valued customer on our current plan, we wanted to share an exciting upgrade opportunity tailored just for you.

Introducing our Essential 20GB plan! For just £18 a month, you’ll receive:
- 20GB of 4G/5G data, perfect for your browsing, social media, and streaming needs.
- Unlimited calls and texts, so you can stay connected without worrying about extra charges.
- 3GB of EU roaming included, making it easier to stay in touch while traveling.

This plan offers great value for everyday use, ensuring you have plenty of data to support your lifestyle.

Ready to upgrade? Click here to make the switch today!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade Your Device for an Enhanced Experience, Mohammed!
output.body:
Hello Mohammed Al-Rashid,

We hope you’re enjoying your Samsung Galaxy S24 on your current plan! As a valued customer for over 5 years, we want to offer you an exclusive opportunity to upgrade to the latest Samsung Galaxy S24 model.

With its Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, stunning 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display, and a remarkable 200MP main camera, this premium device is designed to elevate your mobile experience. Plus, the all-day battery life with 45W charging ensures you stay connected without interruptions.

Given your monthly data usage of 28GB, this upgrade not only enhances your device but also aligns perfectly with your lifestyle.

Ready to take your mobile experience to the next level? Click here to explore your upgrade options today!

Best regards,
[Your Company Name] Customer Care Team

output.subject: Upgrade Your Plan for Unlimited 5G Benefits!
output.body:
Hi Sophie,

We hope you're enjoying your Samsung Galaxy A54 and your current plan! As a valued customer with us for over a year, we wanted to share an exciting upgrade opportunity tailored just for you.

With our new Unlimited 5G plan, you can enjoy the freedom of unlimited data, allowing you to stream, game, and work from anywhere without worrying about data limits. Plus, you'll get unlimited calls and texts, 10GB of EU roaming included, and priority network access for a seamless experience.

This premium plan is available for just £55 a month. It’s a fantastic way to enhance your mobile experience while ensuring you stay connected.

Ready to make the switch? Click here to upgrade today!

Best regards,
The Team

output.subject: Upgrade to the iPhone 15 Pro, James!
output.body:
Hi James,

As a valued premium subscriber with us for over 3 years, we appreciate your loyalty! We noticed that you’re currently using the iPhone 12 and regularly enjoy a data usage of 45GB per month on your plan.

We’re excited to offer you an upgrade to the new iPhone 15 Pro for just £55 a month. This device features the powerful A17 Pro chip, a stunning 48MP main camera with 3x optical zoom, and a ProMotion 120Hz always-on display. Plus, with its titanium build and all-day battery life, it’s designed to enhance your mobile experience.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to elevate your device and enjoy the ultimate iPhone experience!

Ready to upgrade? Click here to get started today!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
